headline: FedEx Corp (FDX) Spins Off Freight Unit. Don’t Miss the Point
summary: FedEx Corp (NYSE:FDX) is one of the best stocks to buy according to billionaire Bill Gates. FedEx shares are up more than 50% over the past six months and have soared more than 85% over the past year. Analysts see more upside in the stock. On June 1, FedEx Corp (NYSE:FDX) completed the spinoff of […]
